title: An Actor's Revenge
writer: Kon Ichikawa, Hiroaki Fujii, Tomio Takamori
actors: Kazuo Hasegawa, Fujiko Yamamoto, Ayako Wakao
plot: Yukinojo, a Kabuki actor, seeks revenge by destroying the three men who caused the deaths of his parents. Also involved are the daughter of one of Yukinojo's targets, two master thieves, and a swordsman who himself is out to kill ...
